THE POWER OF A NETWORK

BE Independent

THE SUPPORT OF AN EXPERT WHO HELPS YOU UNDERSTAND AND APPLY OUR HIGH PERFORMANCE METHODOLOGY.

    Sophie BECHARD

    Viseeon Cergy

    “I don't know if it's the sponsor & mentor thing, or if it's the extreme ease of being called by our first names and finding support, but the idea of family is the first one that comes to my mind.”

      Guy FOURMY

      Viseeon Betton

      "VISEEON is the only international network of independent accountants with the power of a big and built on mutual support with the power of relationship marketing."

        Erwann COCAUT

        Viseeon NOGENT-LE-ROI

        "Viseeon is "my augmented" employee"

          Éric CHEVALIER

          Viseeon AUXERRE RIVE DROITE

          "Viseeon is a wonderful opportunity for me! It's a chance for any accountant to combine performance with a human adventure. Thanks to the VISEEON method, it's never been easier to develop and manage your practice."

            Mélanie PASCAL

            Viseeon EVRY

            "Viseeon is a big family of independent accountants offering everyone the benefit of a multitude of services and tools, enabling considerable development and new sources of remuneration."

              Cyril VERCHERE

              Viseeon ISSY LES MOULINEAUX

              "Viseeon is the accountant of the 21st century, revolutioning the profession by offering the very best in digital services for accountants, enabling them to provide their clients with paperless accounting in real time. And as well as saving time by automating tasks, Viseeon also offers excellent personalised advice.”

              The Strength of the Viseeon Model

              CUSTOMERS TURN KEY DIGITAL PLATFORM  HIGH PROFITABILITY INTERNATIONAL POWER OF MLM 

              FROM "STANDARD" OFFICE TO EXCELLENCE!

              Get to know our network

              BE Viseeonary

              • Why be a viseeonary?

                HUMAN AND INTERNATIONAL ADVENTURE

                Viseeon allows you to create a second source of income by developing a team of Viseeoners.

                Find out how!

              • Why be a viseeonary?

                IMPROVE PRODUCTIVITY

                Take advantage of our technology ecosystem and methods to save time and focus on your priorities.

                Find out how!

              • What does Viseeon do for you?

                IMPROVE YOUR PRACTICE'S PROFITABILITY

                50% of accountants believe that technology would increase their turnover. In Viseeon you have faster growth, thanks to strength and a brand. 

                Find out how!
